title: 2 Cheap Stocks to Add to Your Watchlist
text: Whirlpool is suffering from slumping demand for appliances, but the company is navigating through and producing decent profits. International Paper is also seeing lower demand, but the stock has become cheap enough to be compelling.

title: International Paper (IP) Down 12% in 6 Months: Will It Recover?
text: Declines in prices and volumes due to lower consumer spending, as well as higher costs, have been weighing on International Paper's (IP) price performance.

title: How Attractive Is International Paper's 6% Yield?
text: International Paper is a Tennessee-based packaging company with a 6% yield but weak long-term performance, making it a value stock. The company faced headwinds in Q1 2023 due to inventory destocking and adverse market conditions, but expects improvement in the second half of the year.
